title: みんなの人気者の後に・目指すは……

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara and I decide to watch the Arima
Kinen... a very high-profile race in which the
participants are all popular and top-class
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her heart pounds as she watches Special Week
and Grass Wonder push themselves to their
absolute limits in this fierce competition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She realizes she wants to race in such an exciting
place too and loudly declares that she plans to
enter the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing those words, the audience members
around her begin to murmur about how absurd
that sounds.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Haru Urara is not to be swayed. She
begins her long and arduous path toward entering
the Arima Kinen!
